Name: StatusPage.io - Create Scheduled Maintenance Incident
Description: Creates or updates a scheduled maintenance incident on StatusPage.io

Parameters.Name: IncidentName
Parameters.Label: Scheduled Maintenance Name
Parameters.HelpText: The name of the scheduled maintenance incident.

Parameters.Name: IncidentStatus
Parameters.Label: Status
Parameters.HelpText: The status of the incident, one of scheduled|in_progress|verifying|completed

Parameters.Name: IncidentMessage
Parameters.Label: Message
Parameters.HelpText: Optional message to add to scheduled maintenance incident.

Parameters.Name: ComponentId
Parameters.Label: ComponentId
Parameters.HelpText: Optional component id to reference for the scheduled maintenance incident. Talk to your StatusPage.io administrator for details.

Parameters.Name: PageId
Parameters.Label: StatusPage.io Page Id
Parameters.HelpText: StatusPage.io Organization or "Page ID". Visit the [API authentication docs](http://doers.statuspage.io/api/authentication/) for details.

Parameters.Name: ApiKey
Parameters.Label: StatusPage.io API Key
Parameters.HelpText: StatusPage.io API key for the organization. Visit the [API Authentication docs](http://doers.statuspage.io/api/authentication/) for details.
